---
title: "Data Claening"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
```

**加载所需要的包**
```{r}
# 配置R包
if (!require(pacman)){
        install.packages("pacman")
        library(pacman)
}

pacman::p_load(
  "tidyverse", "ggplot2", "cowplot", "bruceR","ggstatsplot", "papaja",
  "palmerpenguins", "dplyr", "patchwork", "RColorBrewer"
)

source("Functions/R_rainclouds.R")
```

## 1. 读取数据

**读取目录下的原始数据**

```{r}
# 设置目标文件夹的上级路径
parent_folder <- "../../3_Data/3_1_exp1/RawData/"

# 指定需要读取的子文件夹名称
sub_folders <- c("motion", "color")

# 创建空列表存储所有文件路径
all_file_list <- c()

# 遍历每个子文件夹，收集符合条件的文件路径
for (folder in sub_folders) {
  # 拼接完整的文件夹路径
  folder_path <- file.path(parent_folder, folder)
  
  # 列出当前文件夹中符合条件的文件
  file_list <- list.files(
    path = folder_path,
    pattern = "*exp1_subj.*\\.csv$", 
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  
  # 将当前文件夹的文件路径添加到总列表中
  all_file_list <- c(all_file_list, file_list)
}

# 创建一个空列表来存储所有数据
df_list_1 <- list()

# 逐个读取文件并存储（保留原文件名作为列表元素名称）
for (file in all_file_list) {
  # 获取文件名（不带扩展名）
  file_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))  
  # 将数据存储在列表中
  tryCatch({
    df_list_1[[file_name]] <- read.csv(file)
  })
}

# 可选：查看读取的文件数量和名称
cat("共读取", length(df_list_1), "个文件")
print(names(df_list_1))
```
## 2. 数据清洗

```{r}
# 创建输出文件夹（如果不存在）
output_path <- "../../3_Data/3_1_exp1/CleanData"
if (!dir.exists(output_path)) {
  dir.create(output_path, recursive = TRUE)
}

# 逐篇处理每个数据框
for (file_name in names(df_list_1)) {
  data <- df_list_1[[file_name]]

  # 提取被试信息
  participant_info <- data[data$part == "survey", "response"]
  participant_info <- gsub("[{}\"]", "", participant_info) # 去掉多余的字符
  info_list <- strsplit(participant_info, ",")[[1]]

  # 创建新的变量
  participant_data <- data.frame(
    subj_idx = file_name,
    Sex = as.character(NA),
    Age = as.numeric(NA),
    Handedness = as.character(NA),
    Color_blindness = as.character(NA),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # 先按照下划线分割字符串
  split_data <- strsplit(participant_data$subj_idx, "_")
  # 提取分割后的第3个元素（数字部分在第3个位置，可根据实际调整）并转换为数值
  participant_data$subj_idx <- as.numeric(lapply(split_data, function(x) {
    gsub("[^0-9]", "", x[[3]])  # 提取纯数字部分
  }))

  for (info in info_list) {
    key_value <- strsplit(info, ":")[[1]]
    key <- trimws(key_value[1])
    value <- trimws(key_value[2])
    if (key == "sex"){
      participant_data$Sex <- switch(
        value, "男" = 1, "女" = 2
      )
    }
    if (key == "age") participant_data$Age <- as.numeric(value)
    if (key == "hands") participant_data$Handedness <- value
    if (key == "color_blindness") participant_data$Color_blindness <- value
  }

  # 提取行为数据
  behavior_data <- data[
    data$part %in% c("motion_test","match_RDK","RDK"),
    c(
      "part", "rt", "response", "correct", "coherent_direction","coherence", 
      "isMatch", "association", "difficulty", "dot_color_final","target_color_proportion"
    )
  ]
  
  # 分别提取正式试次
  official_trials <- do.call(
    rbind,
    lapply(unique(behavior_data$part), function(part) {
      part_data <- behavior_data[behavior_data$part == part, ]
      if (part == "match_RDK") {
        return(tail(part_data, 384)) # 匹配任务384次
      } else if (part == "RDK") {
        return(tail(part_data, 192)) # 辨别任务192次
      } else {
        return(NULL)
      }
    })
  )

  # 合并被试信息和行为数据
  final_data <- cbind(participant_data, official_trials)

  # 输出到新的CSV文件
  output_file <- file.path(output_path, paste0(file_name, "_Clean.csv"))
  write.csv(final_data, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
}
```


**读取清洗后的数据**

```{r message=FALSE}
# 设置目标文件夹相对路径
folder_path <- "../../3_Data/3_1_exp1/CleanData"

# 列出所有含有"pilot_expt_"的csv文件
file_list <- list.files(
  path = folder_path,
  pattern = "*exp1_subj_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE
)

# 创建一个空列表来存储数据
df_list_1 <- list()

# 逐个读取文件并存储
for (file in file_list) {
  file_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file)) # 获取文件名（不带扩展名）
  df_list_1[[file_name]] <- read.csv(file) # 将数据存储在列表中
}

# 清除不需要的变量
rm(participant_info, info_list, participant_data, split_data,
   behavior_data, official_trials, final_data, output_file, file, file_list,
   file_name, folder_path, info, key, key_value, value)

# 把 df_list_1 传送给 data
data <- do.call(rbind, df_list_1)
```

## 3. 被试人口学信息统计
```{r}
# 基于有效被试的人口学信息统计
df.basic <- data %>%
  dplyr::select(subj_idx, Age, Sex) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(subj_idx, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%  # 根据subject去重，保留完整行
  # 创建分组变量（1-70为运动组，71-141为颜色组）
  dplyr::mutate(
    subj_group = dplyr::case_when(
      subj_idx >= 1 & subj_idx <= 70 ~ "Group1 (motion)",
      subj_idx >= 71 & subj_idx <= 141 ~ "Group2 (color)",
    )
  ) %>%
  # 按创建的分组变量分组，再汇总统计
  dplyr::group_by(subj_group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    N = length(subj_idx),  # 每组总人数
    Nf = length(Sex[Sex == "2"]),  # 每组女性人数（Sex=2）
    Nm = length(Sex[Sex == "1"]),  # 每组男性人数（Sex=1）
    Age_mean = round(mean(Age, na.rm = TRUE), 2),  # 每组平均年龄
    Age_sd = round(sd(Age, na.rm = TRUE), 2),  # 每组年龄标准差
    .groups = "drop"  # 取消分组，返回普通数据框
  )

df.basic
```
## 4. 数据预处理

定义函数，用来计算平均反应时、正确率和自我-他人差异(SPE)

```{r}
# 计算平均正确率和反应时
compute_rt_acc <- function(data){
  data <- data %>%
    dplyr::filter(part %in% c("match_RDK","RDK")) %>%
    dplyr::filter(rt != -1) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(subj_idx, part, difficulty, association,isMatch) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      # rt = mean(rt, na.rm = TRUE),  # 所有有效 trials 的平均反应时
      rt = mean(rt[correct == 1 & rt >= 100 & rt <= 3000], na.rm = TRUE),  # 仅正确 trials 的平均反应时
      acc = sum(correct == 1 & rt >= 100 & rt <= 3000, na.rm = TRUE) / n(),  # 正确率
      .groups = "drop")
  
  return(data)
}

# 计算自我-他人差异，即SPE
compute_diff <- function(data, keepMatch=TRUE){
  # 决定分组变量
  group_vars <- if(keepMatch) {
    c("subj_idx", "part", "difficulty", "difficulty_code", "isMatch")
  } else {
    c("subj_idx", "part", "difficulty", "difficulty_code")
  }
  
  # 执行数据处理流程
  data_agg <- data %>%
    dplyr::filter(part %in% c("match_RDK","RDK")) %>%
    dplyr::group_by_at(group_vars) %>%  # 使用 group_by_at 接受变量名向量
    dplyr::summarise(
      rt_other = mean(rt[association == "other"], na.rm = TRUE),
      rt_self = mean(rt[association == "self"], na.rm = TRUE),
      acc_other = mean(acc[association == "other"], na.rm = TRUE),
      acc_self = mean(acc[association == "self"], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # 计算差值
  data_result <- data_agg %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      rt_diff_os = rt_other - rt_self, # 反应时越快越好，他人-自我 > 0 为自我优势
      acc_diff_so = acc_self - acc_other # 正确率越高越好，自我-他人 > 0 为自我优势
    )
  
  return(data_result)
}
```

分别提取运动和颜色的数据

```{r}
data <- data %>%
  #对反应时进行筛选
  dplyr::filter(rt >= 100 & rt <= 3000, !is.na(rt)) 
# Motion
data1 <- data %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    subj_idx %in% c( seq(1, 70))) %>%  # 被试编号 1-70 为运动组
  #对反应时进行筛选
  # dplyr::filter(rt >= 100 & rt <= 3000, !is.na(rt)) %>%
  # 先将correct转换为数值型（TRUE=1, FALSE=0）
  dplyr::mutate(correct = as.numeric(as.logical(correct))) %>%
  # 计算每个被试的正确率
  dplyr::group_by(subj_idx, part, difficulty) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(subj_acc = mean(correct, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

# data_motion <- data1 %>%
#   dplyr::select(
#     subj_idx, rt, correct, coherence, part, response, coherent_direction,
#     isMatch, association, difficulty
#   ) %>%
#   dplyr::mutate(rt = rt / 1000) # 把rt转换为以秒为单位

data_motion <- data1 %>%
  dplyr::select(
    subj_idx, rt, correct, coherence, part, response, coherent_direction,
    isMatch, association, difficulty
  ) %>%
  # 先将correct转换为数值型（TRUE=1, FALSE=0）
  dplyr::mutate(correct = as.numeric(as.logical(correct))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(rt = rt / 1000) # 把rt转换为以秒为单位

# 输出到新的CSV文件
output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "data_motion.csv")
utils::write.csv(data_motion, output_file, row.names = FALSE)


data_motion_rt_acc <- compute_rt_acc(data1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group = "motion") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    difficulty_code = factor(
      difficulty,
      levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
      labels = c("very easy", "easy", "difficult", "very difficult")
    )
  )


data_motion_diff <- compute_diff(data_motion_rt_acc) %>%
  #类型为character的转换为因子类型，便于后续分析
  dplyr::mutate(subj_idx = as.factor(subj_idx))

# Color
data2 <- data %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    subj_idx %in% c( seq(70, 141))) %>% # 后70为颜色
  #对反应时进行筛选
  # dplyr::filter(rt >= 200 & rt <= 3000, !is.na(rt)) %>%
  # 先将correct转换为数值型（TRUE=1, FALSE=0）
  dplyr::mutate(correct = as.numeric(as.logical(correct))) %>%
  # 计算每个被试的正确率
  dplyr::group_by(subj_idx, part, difficulty) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(subj_acc = mean(correct, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

data_color <- data2 %>%
  dplyr::select(
    subj_idx, rt, correct, coherence, part, response, dot_color_final,
    isMatch, association, difficulty
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(correct = as.numeric(as.logical(correct))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(rt = rt / 1000)

# 输出到新的CSV文件
output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "data_color.csv")
utils::write.csv(data_color, output_file, row.names = FALSE)

data_color_rt_acc <- compute_rt_acc(data2) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group = "color") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    difficulty_code = factor(
      difficulty,
      levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
      labels = c("very easy", "easy", "difficult", "very difficult")
    )
  )


data_color_diff <- compute_diff(data_color_rt_acc) %>%
  #类型为character的转换为因子类型，便于后续分析
  dplyr::mutate(subj_idx = as.factor(subj_idx))

data_color_diff <- compute_diff(data_color_rt_acc) %>%
  #类型为character的转换为因子类型，便于后续分析
  dplyr::mutate(subj_idx = as.factor(subj_idx))
```


### 数据整理

#### 运动组-匹配任务

```{r}
df_motion_match <- data_motion_rt_acc %>% 
  dplyr::filter(# difficulty %in% c(1, 4), 
    part %in% c('match_RDK')) %>%
  dplyr::select(subj_idx, acc, rt, association, difficulty, difficulty_code, group, isMatch) %>%
  #类型为character的转换为因子类型，便于后续分析
  dplyr::mutate(subj_idx = as.factor(subj_idx),
         association = as.factor(association))

# 输出到新的CSV文件
  output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "df_motion_match.csv")
  utils::write.csv(df_motion_match, output_file, row.names = FALSE)

df_motion_diff_match <- data_motion_diff %>%
  # 只选择难度为1 和 4 的
  dplyr::filter(# difficulty %in% c(1,2,3,4), 
         part %in% c('match_RDK')) %>%
  dplyr::select(subj_idx, acc_diff_so, rt_diff_os, difficulty, difficulty_code, isMatch) %>%
  #类型为character的转换为因子类型，便于后续分析
  dplyr::mutate(subj_idx = as.factor(subj_idx))#  %>%
  # tidyr::pivot_wider(
    # names_from = difficulty,
    # values_from = c(acc_diff_so, rt_diff_os),  # 同时处理acc和rt列
    # names_glue = "{.value}_{difficulty}" ) 

data_motion_match_jasp <- df_motion_match %>%
  # dplyr::select(subj_idx, acc, rt, association, difficulty, group) %>%
  # 组合 part、difficulty、association 为新列名（用下划线连接）
  mutate(new_col = paste(difficulty, association, sep = "_")) %>%
  # 转换为宽表：行由 subj_idx、isMatch、group 定义，列由 new_col 定义，数值为 rt 和 acc
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(subj_idx, group),  # 保持这些列为行标识
    names_from = new_col,                  # 用 new_col 的值作为新列名
    values_from = c(rt, acc),              # 分别将 rt 和 acc 转换为宽表数值
    # names_sep = "_"                        # 列名中用下划线分隔（可选，增强可读性）
  )

# 输出到新的CSV文件
output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "df_motion_diff_match.csv")
utils::write.csv(df_motion_diff_match, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
# output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "data_motion_match_jasp.csv")
# utils::write.csv(data_motion_match_jasp, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
```

#### 运动组-辨别任务

```{r}
df_motion_rdk <- data_motion_rt_acc %>% 
  dplyr::filter(# difficulty %in% c(1, 4), 
    part %in% c('RDK')) %>%
  dplyr::select(subj_idx, acc, rt, association, difficulty, difficulty_code, group) %>%
  #类型为character的转换为因子类型，便于后续分析
  dplyr::mutate(subj_idx = as.factor(subj_idx),
         association = as.factor(association))

# 输出到新的CSV文件
output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "df_motion_rdk.csv")
utils::write.csv(df_motion_rdk, output_file, row.names = FALSE)

df_motion_diff_rdk <- data_motion_diff %>%
  # 只选择难度为1 和 4 的
  dplyr::filter(difficulty %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4), part %in% c('RDK')) %>%
  dplyr::select(subj_idx, acc_diff_so, rt_diff_os, difficulty, difficulty_code) %>%
  #类型为character的转换为因子类型，便于后续分析
  dplyr::mutate(subj_idx = as.factor(subj_idx)) # %>%
  # tidyr::pivot_wider(
    # names_from = difficulty,
    # values_from = c(acc_diff_so, rt_diff_os),  # 同时处理acc和rt列
    # names_glue = "{.value}_{difficulty}" ) 

data_motion_rdk_jasp <- df_motion_rdk %>%
  # 组合 part、difficulty、association 为新列名（用下划线连接）
  mutate(new_col = paste(difficulty, association, sep = "_")) %>%
  # 转换为宽表：行由 subj_idx、isMatch、group 定义，列由 new_col 定义，数值为 rt 和 acc
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(subj_idx, group),  # 保持这些列为行标识
    names_from = new_col,                  # 用 new_col 的值作为新列名
    values_from = c(rt, acc),              # 分别将 rt 和 acc 转换为宽表数值
    # names_sep = "_"                        # 列名中用下划线分隔（可选，增强可读性）
  )


# 输出到新的CSV文件
output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "df_motion_diff_rdk.csv")
utils::write.csv(df_motion_diff_rdk, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "data_motion_rdk_jasp.csv")
utils::write.csv(data_motion_rdk_jasp, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
```

#### 颜色组-匹配任务

```{r}
df_color_match <- data_color_rt_acc %>% 
  dplyr::filter(# difficulty %in% c(1, 4), 
    part %in% c('match_RDK')) %>%
  dplyr::select(subj_idx, acc, rt, association, difficulty, difficulty_code, group,isMatch) %>%
  #类型为character的转换为因子类型，便于后续分析
  dplyr::mutate(subj_idx = as.factor(subj_idx),
         association = as.factor(association))


# 输出到新的CSV文件
output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "df_color_match.csv")
utils::write.csv(df_color_match, output_file, row.names = FALSE)

df_color_diff_match <- data_color_diff %>%
  # 只选择难度为1 和 4 的
  dplyr::filter(difficulty %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4),
         part %in% c('match_RDK')) %>%
  dplyr::select(subj_idx, acc_diff_so, rt_diff_os, difficulty, difficulty_code,isMatch) %>%
  #类型为character的转换为因子类型，便于后续分析
  dplyr::mutate(subj_idx = as.factor(subj_idx)) # %>%
  # tidyr::pivot_wider(
    # names_from = difficulty,
    # values_from = c(acc_diff_so, rt_diff_os),  # 同时处理acc和rt列
    # names_glue = "{.value}_{difficulty}" ) 

# 输出到新的CSV文件
output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "df_color_diff_match.csv")
utils::write.csv(df_color_diff_match, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
```

#### 颜色组-辨别任务

```{r}
df_color_rdk <- data_color_rt_acc %>% 
  dplyr::filter(# difficulty %in% c(1, 4), 
    part %in% c('RDK')) %>%
  dplyr::select(subj_idx, acc, rt, association, difficulty, difficulty_code, group) %>%
  #类型为character的转换为因子类型，便于后续分析
  dplyr::mutate(subj_idx = as.factor(subj_idx),
         association = as.factor(association))

# 输出到新的CSV文件
output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "df_color_rdk.csv")
utils::write.csv(df_color_rdk, output_file, row.names = FALSE)

df_color_diff_rdk <- data_color_diff %>%
  # 只选择难度为1 和 4 的
  dplyr::filter(difficulty %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4), part %in% c('RDK')) %>%
  dplyr::select(subj_idx, acc_diff_so, rt_diff_os, difficulty, difficulty_code) %>%
  #类型为character的转换为因子类型，便于后续分析
  dplyr::mutate(subj_idx = as.factor(subj_idx)) # %>%
  # tidyr::pivot_wider(
    # names_from = difficulty,
    # values_from = c(acc_diff_so, rt_diff_os),  # 同时处理acc和rt列
    # names_glue = "{.value}_{difficulty}" ) 


# 输出到新的CSV文件
output_file <- base::file.path(output_path, "df_color_diff_rdk.csv")
utils::write.csv(df_color_diff_rdk, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
```

## 5. 数据预览

对各组任务的平均正确率和反应时进行可视化
```{r}
matching_task_analysis <- function(data, task){
  
  # 获取数据名
  data_name <- deparse(substitute(data))
  split_result <- strsplit(data_name, "_")[[1]]
  group <- ifelse(length(split_result)>=2, split_result[2], "Unknown")
  group <- paste(group, collapse = "_")
  
  # -------------------------- 自我 / 他人 --------------------------
  data <- data %>% 
    filter(part == task) %>% 
    dplyr::mutate(
      association = factor(
        association, 
        levels = c("self", "other"), 
        labels = c("自我", "他人")
      ),
      # 只保留 自我 / 他人 2个条件
      condition = association
    )
  
  # 配色：2个颜色
  color_palette <- c("#0055BB", "#99C2FF")
  names(color_palette) <- levels(data$condition)
  
  # -------------------------- ACC图 --------------------------
  acc_plot <- ggplot(
    data,
    aes(x = condition, y = acc, fill = condition, colour = condition, alpha = association)
  ) +
    geom_flat_violin(
      position = position_nudge(x = 0.15, y = 0),
      adjust = 1.2, 
      trim = FALSE,
      alpha = 0.7,
      scale = "width" 
    ) +
    geom_jitter(
      aes(x = as.numeric(condition)),
      width = 0.05,
      alpha = 0.4,
      seed = 123,
      size = 0.6,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(
      outlier.shape = NA, 
      width = 0.07, 
      colour = "black",
      fill = NA,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    ylab("ACC") + 
    xlab("") + 
    coord_flip() +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
    scale_alpha_manual(
      values = c("自我" = 1.0, "他人" = 0.5), 
      name = "关联类型"
    ) +
    theme_cowplot() + 
    papaja::theme_apa() +
    # ----------------- ACC 关闭图例 -----------------
    guides(fill = "none", colour = "none", alpha = "none") +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 25, margin = margin(t = 8)),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 25),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 5, b = 10, l = 10)
    )
  
  # -------------------------- RT图（保留图例） --------------------------
  rt_plot <- ggplot(
    data,
    aes(x = condition, y = rt, fill = condition, colour = condition, alpha = association)
  ) +
    geom_flat_violin(
      position = position_nudge(x = 0.15, y = 0),
      adjust = 1.2, 
      trim = FALSE,
      alpha = 0.7,
      scale = "width"
    ) +
    geom_jitter(
      aes(x = as.numeric(condition)),
      width = 0.05,
      alpha = 0.4,
      seed = 123,
      size = 0.6,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(
      outlier.shape = NA, 
      width = 0.07, 
      colour = "black",
      fill = NA,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    ylab("RT (ms)") + 
    xlab("") + 
    coord_flip() +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(500, 3000, by = 500)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
    scale_alpha_manual(
      values = c("自我" = 1.0, "他人" = 0.5),
      name = "关联类型"
    ) +
    theme_cowplot() + 
    papaja::theme_apa() +
    # ----------------- RT 保留图例 -----------------
    guides(
      fill = guide_legend(order = 1, title = "关联类型"),
      colour = "none",
      alpha = "none"
    ) +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 25, margin = margin(t = 8)),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 25),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 23),
      axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 0.5),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 0)
    ) 
  
  # -------------------------- 组合布局 --------------------------
  plot_title <- paste0(task, " ", group)
  combined_plot <- rt_plot + acc_plot +
    plot_annotation(
      title = plot_title,
      theme = theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", margin = margin(b = 15))
      )
    ) +
    plot_layout(
      ncol = 2, 
      widths = c(1.1, 0.9),
      guides = "collect"
    ) &
    theme(legend.position = "right")
  
  print(combined_plot)
  return(invisible(combined_plot))
}
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrain)
library(cowplot)
library(papaja)

matching_task_analysis <- function(data, task){
  
  # 获取数据名，提取分组（motion/color）
  data_name <- deparse(substitute(data))
  split_result <- strsplit(data_name, "_")[[1]]
  group <- ifelse(length(split_result)>=2, split_result[2], "Unknown")
  group <- paste(group, collapse = "_")
  
  # 筛选当前任务数据
  data_raw <- data %>% filter(part == task)
  
  # ---------------------- 匹配任务 match_RDK ----------------------
  if (task == "match_RDK") {
    data <- data_raw %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        # 调换levels顺序：other在前，self在后 → 图例他人在上、自我在下
        association = factor(
          association, 
          levels = c("other", "self"), 
          labels = c("他人", "自我")
        ),
        # 构建垂直分层变量：match在上层，mismatch在下层
        match_layer = factor(
          isMatch,
          levels = c("match", "mismatch"),
          labels = c("匹配条件", "不匹配条件")
        ),
        condition = association
      )
    
    color_palette <- c("#99C2FF", "#0055BB")
    names(color_palette) <- levels(data$condition)
    
    # ---------------------- 匹配任务-ACC图 ----------------------
    acc_plot <- ggplot(
      data,
      aes(x = condition, y = acc, fill = condition, colour = condition, alpha = association)
    ) +
      geom_flat_violin(
        position = position_nudge(x = 0.15, y = 0),
        adjust = 1.2, 
        trim = FALSE,
        alpha = 0.7,
        scale = "width" 
      ) +
      geom_jitter(
        aes(x = as.numeric(condition)),
        width = 0.05,
        alpha = 0.4,
        seed = 123,
        size = 0.6,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      geom_boxplot(
        outlier.shape = NA, 
        width = 0.07, 
        colour = "black",
        fill = NA,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      ylab("ACC") + 
      xlab("") + 
      coord_flip() +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2), limits = c(0, 1)) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
      scale_alpha_manual(
        values = c("他人" = 0.5, "自我" = 1.0), 
        name = "关联类型"
      ) +
      theme_cowplot() + 
      papaja::theme_apa() +
      guides(fill = "none", colour = "none", alpha = "none") +
      # 按match_layer上下分面，无分面坐标轴
      facet_wrap(~match_layer, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
      theme(
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 30, margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 5, b = 10, l = 10),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"), # 分面标题大小
        strip.background = element_blank()
      )
    
    # ---------------------- 匹配任务-RT图 ----------------------
    rt_plot <- ggplot(
      data,
      aes(x = condition, y = rt, fill = condition, colour = condition, alpha = association)
    ) +
      geom_flat_violin(
        position = position_nudge(x = 0.15, y = 0),
        adjust = 1.2, 
        trim = FALSE,
        alpha = 0.7,
        scale = "width"
      ) +
      geom_jitter(
        aes(x = as.numeric(condition)),
        width = 0.05,
        alpha = 0.4,
        seed = 123,
        size = 0.6,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      geom_boxplot(
        outlier.shape = NA, 
        width = 0.07, 
        colour = "black",
        fill = NA,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      ylab("RT (ms)") + 
      xlab("") + 
      coord_flip() +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(500, 3000, by = 500)) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
      scale_alpha_manual(
        values = c("他人" = 0.5, "自我" = 1.0),
        name = "关联类型"
      ) +
      theme_cowplot() + 
      papaja::theme_apa() +
      guides(
        fill = guide_legend(order = 1, title = "关联类型"),
        colour = "none",
        alpha = "none"
      ) +
      # 同ACC分面布局
      facet_wrap(~match_layer, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
      theme(
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 30, margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "cm"),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 0),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
        strip.background = element_blank()
      ) 
  }
  
  # ---------------------- 辨别任务 RDK ----------------------
  else if (task == "RDK") {
    data <- data_raw %>% 
      dplyr::mutate(
        # 调换levels顺序：other在前，self在后
        association = factor(
          association, 
          levels = c("other", "self"), 
          labels = c("他人", "自我")
        ),
        condition = association
      )
    # 配色同步调换
    color_palette <- c("#99C2FF", "#0055BB")
    names(color_palette) <- levels(data$condition)
    
    # ---------------------- 辨别任务-ACC图 ----------------------
    acc_plot <- ggplot(
      data,
      aes(x = condition, y = acc, fill = condition, colour = condition, alpha = association)
    ) +
      geom_flat_violin(
        position = position_nudge(x = 0.15, y = 0),
        adjust = 1.2, 
        trim = FALSE,
        alpha = 0.7,
        scale = "width" 
      ) +
      geom_jitter(
        aes(x = as.numeric(condition)),
        width = 0.05,
        alpha = 0.4,
        seed = 123,
        size = 0.6,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      geom_boxplot(
        outlier.shape = NA, 
        width = 0.07, 
        colour = "black",
        fill = NA,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      ylab("ACC") + 
      xlab("") + 
      coord_flip() +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2), limits = c(0, 1)) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
      scale_alpha_manual(
        values = c("他人" = 0.5, "自我" = 1.0), 
        name = "关联类型"
      ) +
      theme_cowplot() + 
      papaja::theme_apa() +
      guides(fill = "none", colour = "none", alpha = "none") +
      theme(
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 30, margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 5, b = 10, l = 10)
      )
    
    # ---------------------- 辨别任务-RT图 ----------------------
    rt_plot <- ggplot(
      data,
      aes(x = condition, y = rt, fill = condition, colour = condition, alpha = association)
    ) +
      geom_flat_violin(
        position = position_nudge(x = 0.15, y = 0),
        adjust = 1.2, 
        trim = FALSE,
        alpha = 0.7,
        scale = "width"
      ) +
      geom_jitter(
        aes(x = as.numeric(condition)),
        width = 0.05,
        alpha = 0.4,
        seed = 123,
        size = 0.6,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      geom_boxplot(
        outlier.shape = NA, 
        width = 0.07, 
        colour = "black",
        fill = NA,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      ylab("RT (ms)") + 
      xlab("") + 
      coord_flip() +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(500, 3000, by = 500)) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
      scale_alpha_manual(
        values = c("他人" = 0.5, "自我" = 1.0),
        name = "关联类型"
      ) +
      theme_cowplot() + 
      papaja::theme_apa() +
      guides(
        fill = guide_legend(order = 1, title = "关联类型"),
        colour = "none",
        alpha = "none"
      ) +
      theme(
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 30, margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 28),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 28),
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 0)
      ) 
  }
  
  # -------------------------- 统一组合布局（两种任务共用） --------------------------
  plot_title <- paste0(task, " ", group)
  combined_plot <- rt_plot + acc_plot +
    # plot_annotation(
    #   title = plot_title,
    #   theme = theme(
    #     plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", margin = margin(b = 15))
    #   )
    # ) +
    plot_layout(
      ncol = 2, 
      widths = c(1.1, 0.9),
      guides = "collect"
    ) &
    theme(legend.position = "right")
  
  print(combined_plot)
  return(invisible(combined_plot))
}
```

```{r}
#区分难度
matching_task_analysis <- function(data, task){
  
  # 获取数据名，提取分组（motion/color）
  data_name <- deparse(substitute(data))
  split_result <- strsplit(data_name, "_")[[1]]
  group <- ifelse(length(split_result)>=2, split_result[2], "Unknown")
  group <- paste(group, collapse = "_")
  
  # 筛选当前任务数据
  data_raw <- data %>% filter(part == task)
  
  # 全局绘图控制参数
  dodge_width <- 0.8
  acc_y_offset <- -0.06
  rt_y_offset <- -60
  color_palette <- c("#99C2FF", "#0055BB")
  names(color_palette) <- c("他人", "自我")
  
  # ---------------------- 数据统一预处理：4水平难度转换 ----------------------
  data_process <- data_raw %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      association = factor(
        association, 
        levels = c("other", "self"), 
        labels = c("他人", "自我")
      ),
      condition = association,
      # 数字difficulty转为4档文字难度，固定绘图顺序
      difficulty = factor(
        difficulty,
        levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
        labels = c("容易", "较容易", "较困难", "困难")
      )
    )
  
  # ---------------------- 匹配任务 match_RDK ----------------------
  if (task == "match_RDK") {
    data <- data_process %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        match_layer = factor(
          isMatch,
          levels = c("match", "mismatch"),
          labels = c("匹配条件", "不匹配条件")
        )
      )
    
    # ---------------------- 匹配任务-ACC图 ----------------------
    acc_plot <- ggplot(
      data,
      aes(x = difficulty,
          y = acc,
          fill = condition,
          colour = condition,
          group = interaction(difficulty, association))
    ) +
      geom_flat_violin(
        position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
        adjust = 1.2,
        trim = FALSE,
        alpha = 0.7,
        scale = "width"
      ) +
      geom_jitter(
        aes(y = acc + acc_y_offset),
        position = position_jitterdodge(
          dodge.width = dodge_width,
          jitter.height = 0,
          seed = 123
        ),
        alpha = 0.4,
        size = 0.6,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      geom_boxplot(
        aes(y = acc + acc_y_offset),
        outlier.shape = NA,
        width = 0.07,
        colour = "black",
        fill = NA,
        position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      ylab("ACC") +
      xlab("") +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2), limits = c(0, 1)) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
      theme_cowplot() +
      papaja::theme_apa() +
      guides(fill = "none", colour = "none") +
      facet_wrap(~match_layer, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
      theme(
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 30, margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 0.5),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 5, b = 10, l = 10),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
        strip.background = element_blank()
      )
    
    # ---------------------- 匹配任务-RT图 ----------------------
    rt_plot <- ggplot(
      data,
      aes(x = difficulty,
          y = rt,
          fill = condition,
          colour = condition,
          group = interaction(difficulty, association))
    ) +
      geom_flat_violin(
        position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
        adjust = 1.2,
        trim = FALSE,
        alpha = 0.7,
        scale = "width"
      ) +
      geom_jitter(
        aes(y = rt + rt_y_offset),
        position = position_jitterdodge(
          dodge.width = dodge_width,
          jitter.height = 0,
          seed = 123
        ),
        alpha = 0.4,
        size = 0.6,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      geom_boxplot(
        aes(y = rt + rt_y_offset),
        outlier.shape = NA,
        width = 0.07,
        colour = "black",
        fill = NA,
        position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      ylab("RT (ms)") +
      xlab("") +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(1000, 3000, by = 1000)) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette, name = "关联类型") +
      scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
      theme_cowplot() +
      papaja::theme_apa() +
      guides(
        fill = guide_legend(order = 1, title = "关联类型"),
        colour = "none"
      ) +
      facet_wrap(~match_layer, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
      theme(
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 30, margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "cm"),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 0),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
        strip.background = element_blank()
      ) 
  }
  
  # ---------------------- 辨别任务 RDK ----------------------
  else if (task == "RDK") {
    data <- data_process
    
    # ---------------------- 辨别任务-ACC图 ----------------------
    acc_plot <- ggplot(
      data,
      aes(x = difficulty,
          y = acc,
          fill = condition,
          colour = condition,
          group = interaction(difficulty, association))
    ) +
      geom_flat_violin(
        position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
        adjust = 1.2,
        trim = FALSE,
        alpha = 0.7,
        scale = "width"
      ) +
      geom_jitter(
        aes(y = acc + acc_y_offset),
        position = position_jitterdodge(
          dodge.width = dodge_width,
          jitter.height = 0,
          seed = 123
        ),
        alpha = 0.4,
        size = 0.6,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      geom_boxplot(
        aes(y = acc + acc_y_offset),
        outlier.shape = NA,
        width = 0.07,
        colour = "black",
        fill = NA,
        position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      ylab("ACC") +
      xlab("") +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2), limits = c(0, 1)) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
      scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
      theme_cowplot() +
      papaja::theme_apa() +
      guides(fill = "none", colour = "none") +
      theme(
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 30, margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 0.5),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 5, b = 10, l = 10)
      )
    
    # ---------------------- 辨别任务-RT图 ----------------------
    rt_plot <- ggplot(
      data,
      aes(x = difficulty,
          y = rt,
          fill = condition,
          colour = condition,
          group = interaction(difficulty, association))
    ) +
      geom_flat_violin(
        position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
        adjust = 1.2,
        trim = FALSE,
        alpha = 0.7,
        scale = "width"
      ) +
      geom_jitter(
        aes(y = rt + rt_y_offset),
        position = position_jitterdodge(
          dodge.width = dodge_width,
          jitter.height = 0,
          seed = 123
        ),
        alpha = 0.4,
        size = 0.6,
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      geom_boxplot(
        aes(y = rt + rt_y_offset),
        outlier.shape = NA,
        width = 0.07,
        colour = "black",
        fill = NA,
        position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      ylab("RT (ms)") +
      xlab("") +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(1000, 2000, by = 1000)) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette, name = "关联类型") +
      scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
      theme_cowplot() +
      papaja::theme_apa() +
      guides(
        fill = guide_legend(order = 1, title = "关联类型"),
        colour = "none"
      ) +
      theme(
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 30, margin = margin(t = 8)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 28),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 28),
        legend.key.size = unit(2, "cm"),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 0)
      ) 
  }
  
  # -------------------------- 统一组合布局（两种任务共用） --------------------------
  plot_title <- paste0(task, " ", group)
  combined_plot <- rt_plot + acc_plot +
    plot_layout(
      ncol = 2, 
      widths = c(1.1, 0.9),
      guides = "collect"
    ) &
    theme(legend.position = "right")
  
  print(combined_plot)
  return(invisible(combined_plot))
}
```


### 匹配任务
```{r}

# 调用函数
# -------------------------- 调用与保存 --------------------------

p <- matching_task_analysis(data_motion_rt_acc, task = "match_RDK")

# 保存图
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_path, "motion_match_rt_acc.svg"),
  plot = p,
  width = 16,    # 宽度12英寸
  height = 12,    # 高度8英寸
  dpi = 600,     # 600dpi
  bg = "white"   # 强制白色背景，避免透明背景
)

p <- matching_task_analysis(data_color_rt_acc, "match_RDK")
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_path, "color_match_rt_acc.svg"),
  plot = p,
  width = 16,    
  height = 12,    
  dpi = 600,   
  bg = "white"  
)
```

### 辨别任务
```{r}

# 调用函数
p <- matching_task_analysis(data_motion_rt_acc, "RDK")
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_path, "motion_rdk_rt_acc.svg"),
  plot = p,
  width = 16,    
  height = 12,    
  dpi = 600,    
  bg = "white"  
)

p <- matching_task_analysis(data_color_rt_acc, "RDK")
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_path, "color_rdk_rt_acc.svg"),
  plot = p,
  width = 16,    
  height = 12,    
  dpi = 600,    
  bg = "white"  
)
```

```{r}
# 整合两个任务的可视化函数
task_combined_analysis <- function(data, task1 = "match_RDK", task2 = "RDK") {
  
  # 获取组别名称
  data_name <- deparse(substitute(data))
  split_result <- strsplit(data_name, "_")[[1]]
  group <- ifelse(length(split_result)>=2, split_result[2], "Unknown")
  group <- paste(group, collapse = "_")
  
  # 数据预处理
  data_combined <- data %>% 
    dplyr::filter(part %in% c(task1, task2)) %>% 
    dplyr::mutate(
      task = dplyr::case_when(
        part == task1 ~ "Matching Task",
        part == task2 ~ "Discrimination Task",
        TRUE ~ part
      ),
      # 固定顺序：匹配在前，辨别在后
      task = base::factor(task, levels = c("Matching Task", "Discrimination Task")),
      difficulty = base::as.factor(difficulty),
      subj_idx = base::as.factor(subj_idx)
    ) %>% 
    tidyr::drop_na(acc, rt)
  
  n_difficulty <- base::length(base::unique(data_combined$difficulty_code))
  color_palette <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(base::min(n_difficulty, 8), "Set2")
  if (n_difficulty > base::length(color_palette)) {
    color_palette <- base::rep(color_palette, length.out = n_difficulty)
  }
  base::names(color_palette) <- base::unique(data_combined$difficulty_code)
  
  # ===================== ACC 图 =====================
  acc_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(data_combined, ggplot2::aes(x = task, y = acc)) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(
      outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.5, width = 0.18, colour = "black", fill = NA
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_jitter(
      ggplot2::aes(color = difficulty_code), width = 0.08, size = 1.1, alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_line(
      ggplot2::aes(group = base::interaction(subj_idx, difficulty_code), color = difficulty_code),
      alpha = 0.25, linewidth = 0.4
    ) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~difficulty_code, nrow = n_difficulty) +
    ggplot2::ylab("Accuracy") + 
    ggplot2::xlab("Task") + 
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0.3, 1, 0.1), limits = c(0.3, 1)) +
    ggplot2::scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
    papaja::theme_apa() +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot() +
    ggplot2::guides(colour = "none") +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14),
      axis.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
      strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      panel.spacing = ggplot2::unit(0.4, "cm")
    )
  
  # ===================== RT 图 =====================
  rt_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(data_combined, ggplot2::aes(x = task, y = rt)) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(
      outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.5, width = 0.18, colour = "black", fill = NA
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_jitter(
      ggplot2::aes(color = difficulty_code), width = 0.08, size = 1.1, alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_line(
      ggplot2::aes(group = base::interaction(subj_idx, difficulty_code), color = difficulty_code),
      alpha = 0.25, linewidth = 0.4
    ) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~difficulty_code, nrow = n_difficulty) +
    ggplot2::ylab("Reaction Time (ms)") + 
    ggplot2::xlab("Task") + 
    ggplot2::scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
    papaja::theme_apa() +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot() +
    ggplot2::guides(colour = "none") +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14),
      axis.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
      strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      panel.spacing = ggplot2::unit(0.4, "cm")
    )
  
  # ===================== 组合拼图 =====================
  combined_plot <- acc_plot + rt_plot +
    patchwork::plot_annotation(
      title = group,
      theme = ggplot2::theme(
        plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
      )
    ) +
    patchwork::plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(1, 1))
  
  base::print(combined_plot)
  return(base::invisible(combined_plot))
}
```

```{r}
# plot_result_motion <- task_combined_analysis(data_motion_rt_acc, task1 = "match_RDK", task2 = "RDK")
# plot_result_color <- task_combined_analysis(data_color_rt_acc, task1 = "match_RDK", task2 = "RDK")
# 保存
ggplot2::ggsave(
  plot =plot_result_motion,
  width = 12,
  filename = "Fig/data_preview_motion.svg"
)
ggplot2::ggsave(
  plot =plot_result_color,
  width = 12,
  filename = "Fig/data_preview_color.svg" 
)
```

```{r}
# 加载必要包（仅保留核心包）
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# 主函数：计算不同难度下ACC和RT的两两差值
diff_difficulty_simple <- function(
  data,  # 输入数据集（如df_color_diff_match、df_motion_diff_match）
  acc_col = "acc_diff_so",  # ACC列名
  rt_col = "rt_diff_os",    # RT列名
  difficulty_col = "difficulty") {
  
  # 将难度转为因子型，提取所有难度水平
  data <- data %>% mutate(!!sym(difficulty_col) := as.factor(!!sym(difficulty_col)))
  difficulty_levels <- levels(data[[difficulty_col]])
  
  # 生成所有难度的两两组合
  difficulty_combos <- combn(difficulty_levels, 2, simplify = FALSE)
  
  # 计算每对难度的ACC和RT差值
  diff_results <- lapply(difficulty_combos, function(combo) {
    # 提取两个难度的数据
    d1 <- data %>% filter(!!sym(difficulty_col) == combo[1])
    d2 <- data %>% filter(!!sym(difficulty_col) == combo[2])
    
    # 计算均值（也可计算中位数，替换为median即可）
    acc_mean1 <- mean(d1[[acc_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
    acc_mean2 <- mean(d2[[acc_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
    rt_mean1 <- mean(d1[[rt_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
    rt_mean2 <- mean(d2[[rt_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # 计算差值（难度1 - 难度2，也可改为难度2 - 难度1）
    acc_diff <- acc_mean1 - acc_mean2
    rt_diff <- rt_mean1 - rt_mean2
    
    # 返回结果
    return(tibble(
      难度组合 = paste(combo[1], "vs", combo[2]),
      难度1 = combo[1],
      难度2 = combo[2],
      ACC_难度1均值 = acc_mean1,
      ACC_难度2均值 = acc_mean2,
      ACC差值 = acc_diff,
      RT_难度1均值 = rt_mean1,
      RT_难度2均值 = rt_mean2,
      RT差值 = rt_diff
    ))
  }) %>% bind_rows()
  
  # 按ACC差值绝对值排序（也可按RT差值排序，修改为abs(RT差值)即可）
  diff_results <- diff_results %>% arrange(desc(abs(ACC差值)))
  
  # 输出结果
  cat("=== 不同难度下ACC和RT的两两差值（按ACC差值大小排序）===\n")
  print(diff_results)
  
  # 可视化差值
  diff_plot <- diff_results %>%
    select(难度组合, ACC差值, RT差值) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(ACC差值, RT差值), names_to = "指标", values_to = "差值") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = 难度组合, y = 差值, fill = 指标)) +
    geom_col(alpha = 0.7, position = "dodge") +
    labs(x = "难度组合", y = "差值（前一个难度减后一个）", title = "不同两两难度下SPE的差值") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  print(diff_plot)
  
  # 返回结果
  return(diff_results)
}
```

```{r}
diff_difficulty_simple(df_motion_diff_match)
diff_difficulty_simple(df_color_diff_match)

```


```{r}
diff_difficulty_simple(df_motion_diff_rdk)
diff_difficulty_simple(df_color_diff_rdk)

```
